zh.lifeSummary: 當Celestine MacDonald 1st of Lochalsh於1429年出生在蘇格蘭可洛馬迪夏爾可洛馬迪時，他的父親Alexander MacDonald of Islay, 3rd Lord of the Isles, 11th Earl of Ross33歲，母親Elizabeth Seton of Gordon25歲。他於1448年與Finola Maclean of Duart在英國蘇格蘭羅斯 安德 可洛馬迪丁瓦爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1476年在蘇格蘭洛-爾洛馬爾吉享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Celestine MacDonald 1st of Lochalsh于1429年出生在苏格兰可洛馬迪夏爾可洛馬迪时，他的父亲Alexander MacDonald of Islay, 3rd Lord of the Isles, 11th Earl of Ross33岁，母亲Elizabeth Seton of Gordon25岁。他于1448年与Finola Maclean of Duart在英国苏格兰羅斯 安德 可洛馬迪丁瓦爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1476年在苏格兰洛-爾洛馬爾吉享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: MacDonald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDonald
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Domhnaill ‘son of Domhnall’, a name derived from the Celtic elements domno- ‘world’ + val- ‘might, rule’. Donald is an Anglicized form (via Latin) of this personal name used in Scotland, though the surname is also widespread in Ireland. The name is equivalent to Irish McDonnell and McConnell , and to Manx Cannell .

History: This is the name of the largest and most disparate of the Scottish clans (Clan Donald), associated in particular with the Hebrides and claiming descent from Domhnall mac Raghnaill mac Somhairle, who lived in the late 12th century. From that time until 1493 the head of the clan was known as Lord (or King) of the Isles. The reigns of the Lords of the Isles were always stormy, often in conflict with the kings of Scotland, and peppered with disasters. After a series of defeats in the 1480s, Eoin Mac Dhomhnaill a Ìle (John Macdonald of Islay, Earl of Ross and Lord of the Isles) forfeited his lands, his power, and his title as Lord of the Isles in 1493 to King James IV of Scotland. By then, a branch of the family had settled in the Antrim Glens in Ireland and members moved between the southern Hebrides and Ireland throughout the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Celestine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Celestine MacDonald 1st of Lochalsh was born in 1429, in Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland, his father, Alexander MacDonald of Islay, 3rd Lord of the Isles, 11th Earl of Ross, was 33 and his mother, Elizabeth Seton of Gordon, was 25. He married Finola Maclean of Duart in 1448, in Dingwall, Ross and Cromarty, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1476, in Rosemarkie, Ross-shire, Scotland, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Celestine MacDonald 1st of Lochalsh est né en 1429, à Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Écosse, son père, Alexander MacDonald of Islay, 3rd Lord of the Isles, 11th Earl of Ross, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Seton of Gordon, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Finola Maclean of Duart en 1448, à Dingwall, Ross and Cromarty, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1476, à Rosemarkie, Ross-shire, Écosse, à l’âge de 47 ans.

ko.Tulloch Castle, Dingwall, Ross & Cromart: 영국 스코틀랜드 로스 앤드 크로마티 딩월
ko.lifeSummary: Celestine MacDonald 1st of Lochalsh(이)가 1429년 스컷랜드 크로마티실르 크로마티에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander MacDonald of Islay, 3rd Lord of the Isles, 11th Earl of Ross(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Seton of Gordon(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1448년 영국 스코틀랜드 로스 앤드 크로마티 딩월에서 Finola Maclean of Duart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1476년 스컷랜드 로스-실르 로즈마키에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Tulloch Castle, Dingwall, Ross & Cromart: дингвалл, росс анд кромерти, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Celestine MacDonald 1st of Lochalsh родился в 1429 г. в местности кромерти, кромертишир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Alexander MacDonald of Islay, 3rd Lord of the Isles, 11th Earl of Ross было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Seton of Gordon, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Finola Maclean of Duart в 1448 г. в местности дингвалл, росс анд кромерти, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1476 г. в местности росемарки, росс-шир, Шотландия в возрасте 47 лет.

Se casó con Finola Maclean of Duart en 1448, en Dingwall, Ross and Cromarty, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1476, en Rosemarkie, Ross-shire, Scotland, a la edad de 47 años.
